project.title: Project Blueprint
project.description: A customized interactive user-created workspace design or standard default template

prompt.description: User design description prompt used to compile components

createdAt.description: Human friendly formatted creation date or timestamp string

status.description: Active compile state status of the project engine

techStack.description: Technical dependency tags associated with the layout

isTemplate.description: True if this represents a high fidelity global template showcased in side panel

ownerId.description: Identifier tracking authorized creator owner credentials

avatarBg.description: Visual decoration CSS styles applied on sidebar avatars

iconCode.description: Shorthand abbreviations visible in showcase avatars

showcase.title: Showcase Card
showcase.description: Featured interactive template card visible on the main page

id.description: Unique system ID of the featured element

title.description: Name of the showcased card design

likes.description: Number of stars or user likes accumulated

views.description: Formatted traffic string visible to users

glowColor.description: RGB or HEX color applied as hover radial decoration

description.description: Detailed functional summary of the app blueprint

/projects/{projectId}.description: Collection persistent storage keeping real user blueprints and platform global showcase cards

/showcase/{showcaseId}.description: Featured global cards database displayed dynamically on landing deck layout
